cards.title: Buy 2, Save 15%
cards.text: Combine any two fragrances from our collection and save instantly. Mention the offer when you message us on WhatsApp.

cards.title: Welcome Discount
cards.text: New clients enjoy a special introductory rate on their first order — a token of trust as we begin working together.

cards.title: On Selected Orders
cards.text: Qualifying orders ship with no delivery charge. Ask our team on WhatsApp if your order qualifies.

featured.name: Prestige Noir

featured.name: Prestige Or
featured.desc: Warm vanilla and saffron wrapped in golden sandalwood.

featured.name: Prestige Éclat
featured.desc: Bright citrus and white musk for an effortless everyday signature.

men.name: Prestige Intense

men.name: Prestige Cuir
men.desc: Smoky leather balanced with warm spice notes.

men.name: Prestige Sport
men.desc: Fresh aquatic and citrus accord for daily energy.

women.name: Prestige Fleur
women.desc: Jasmine and peony layered over soft musk.

women.name: Prestige Rose Gold

women.name: Prestige Éternelle
